series_metadata.series_description: Accidents - If an individual is involved in a motor vehicle accident, they may file a crash report (BMV-3303) with the Ohio Bureau of Motor Vehicles within six months after the accident if both of the following apply: 1. There was property damage in excess of $400 or there was personal injury; 2. The driver or owner of the other vehicle did not have insurance or other financial responsibility coverage at the time of the accident. All incoming correspondence relating to the above suspension are stored in the image case folder.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: All paper documents are scanned into image and held for 30 days and then placed in the recycle bin to be destroyed. ; Electronic: IT should scan files, if case has been closed for 7 years, delete records. All cases generated on/or after January, 1989 are stored in imaging. Retain for 7 years from close date., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
